payload.review_text: Plan-safety re-audit iteration 2 of PLAN-AA1: 0 blockers, mechanically executable, ready to advance to checked. H302 resolved: Step 3 no longer directs the executor to run any shell command ('Do NOT run pytest or any shell command; you have no shell.'); ground-truth numbers embedded; Read/Edit only; the three acceptance: items re-derive live count in orchestrator parent context. H999 resolved: all four verify: items rewritten from POSIX grep -q to portable python -c with pathlib. Substrate fidelity PASS (find_completed_session session.py:50, DEFAULT_CONFIG cli.py). Falsifiability PASS. Step count 3 (<12). No new findings.

findings.message: Prior blocker resolved: Step 3 is now Read/Edit-only with explicit no-shell directive and embedded ground-truth numbers.
Prior warning resolved: four verify: items now portable python -c with pathlib.
